items.raw_excerpt: Evidence of ancient burnt grasses unearthed in a Victorian cave on GunaiKurnai country suggest old ancestors used the cave for fire rituals during the Ice Age.
items.summary_en: Scientists found burnt grass remains deep inside a cave in Victoria, Australia. The tiny plant 'skeletons' are about 25,000 years old. They suggest that Indigenous ancestors used the cave for fire rituals during the Ice Age.
items.summary_ko: 호주 빅토리아주의 한 동굴 깊숙한 곳에서 탄 풀 잔해가 발견되었다. 이 작은 식물 '뼈대'는 약 2만5천 년 전 것으로 추정되며, 빙하기에 원주민 조상들이 이 동굴에서 불 의식을 치렀음을 시사한다.
items.title_en: Grass 'skeletons' hint at 25,000-year-old Indigenous fire ritual in cave
items.title_ko: 동굴에서 발견된 풀 '뼈대', 2만5천 년 전 원주민 불 의식 암시
items.title_original: Grass 'skeletons' hint at 25,000-year-old Indigenous fire ritual in cave

items.raw_excerpt: Która wieś na Podlasiu zapewnia mieszkańcom najwyższą jakość życia? Odpowiedź przynosi analiza oparta na sztucznej inteligencji, która prześledziła najnowsze da...
items.summary_en: An AI analysis has identified the best village to live in Poland's Podlasie region. Residents say this place offers the highest quality of life. Many locals dream of settling down there.
items.summary_ko: 폴란드 동북부 포들라시 지역에서 AI 분석을 통해 가장 살기 좋은 마을이 선정됐다. 주민들은 이곳이 최고의 삶의 질을 제공한다고 말한다. 많은 현지인들이 이 마을에 정착하기를 꿈꾸고 있다.
items.title_en: Best Place to Live in Podlasie: A Village That Locals Dream Of
items.title_ko: 폴란드 포들라시에 가장 살기 좋은 마을은?
items.title_original: To tu żyje się najlepiej na Podlasiu. Mieszkańcy tego miasta marzą o osiedleniu się w tym miejscu - Białystok Radio ESKA

items.raw_excerpt: Disability charities say the practice makes streets harder to navigate for wheelchair users and people with limited sight.
items.summary_en: Some local councils in England are accused of encouraging parking on pavements. Disability charities say the practice makes it harder for wheelchair users and people with limited sight to navigate streets.
items.summary_ko: 영국의 일부 지방자치단체들이 보도 주차를 사실상 장려하고 있다는 비판이 나왔다. 장애인 단체들은 이러한 관행이 휠체어 이용자와 시력이 약한 사람들에게 거리 이동을 더욱 어렵게 만든다고 지적하고 있다.
items.title_en: Pavement parking 'encouraged' by local councils
items.title_ko: 지방자치단체, 보도 주차 '장려' 논란
items.title_original: Pavement parking 'encouraged' by local councils

items.raw_excerpt: Uisce Éireann is extending its hosepipe ban nationwide, bringing every county under water restrictions from just after midnight on Friday.
items.summary_en: Ireland's water utility Uisce Eireann is extending its hosepipe ban to cover the entire country. Water restrictions will apply in every county from just after midnight on Friday.
items.summary_ko: 아일랜드 수도업체 우이스케 에이레안이 호스 사용 금지를 전국으로 확대한다. 금요일 자정 이후 모든 카운티에 물 사용 제한이 적용될 예정이다.
items.title_en: Hosepipe ban extended to all of Ireland from Friday
items.title_ko: 호스 사용 금지, 금요일부터 전국 확대
items.title_original: Hosepipe ban extended nationwide from Friday

items.raw_excerpt: The Airport Rail Link that connects Suvarnabhumi International Airport, Thailand’s main airport, and inner Bangkok is operating only one train as its railway turntable broke down on Wednesday. The train is operating at one-hour intervals.
items.summary_en: Thailand's Airport Rail Link between Suvarnabhumi Airport and inner Bangkok broke its railway turntable on Wednesday. The line is running only one train with one-hour intervals between services.
items.summary_ko: 태국 수완나품공항과 방콕 시내를 연결하는 공항철도의 선로전환장치가 고장나 하루에 한 대의 열차만 운행하고 있다. 열차는 1시간 간격으로 운행되고 있다.
items.title_en: Airport Rail Link runs one train per hour
items.title_ko: 공항철도 1시간 간격 운행
items.title_original: Airport Rail Link service at one hour intervals

items.raw_excerpt: The Mackenzie District mayor says a $2.5 million investment to improve public toilets is a "good start going forward".
items.summary_en: Mackenzie District in New Zealand will receive $2.5 million to improve its public toilets. The mayor says this investment is a good start for the community. The funding aims to make facilities cleaner and more comfortable for residents and visitors.
items.summary_ko: 뉴질랜드 맥켄지 지구가 공중화장실 개선을 위해 250만 뉴질랜드 달러를 투자받게 됩니다. 지구 시장은 이번 투자가 지역사회에 좋은 시작이라고 말했습니다. 이 자금은 주민과 방문객들을 위해 시설을 더 깨끗하고 편안하게 만들 것입니다.
items.title_en: Public toilets in Mackenzie District to get $2.5 million investment
items.title_ko: 맥켄지 지구, 공중화장실 개선에 250만 뉴질랜드 달러 투자
items.title_original: Public toilets in Mackenzie District to get $2.5 million investment

items.raw_excerpt: Papatoetoe Intermediate School has been forced to cancel its school camp this year because so few families could afford it.
items.summary_en: Papatoetoe Intermediate School in Auckland had to cancel its school camp this year. Many families could not afford to send their children. The school said it was a difficult decision but necessary.
items.summary_ko: 오클랜드 파파토에토에 중학교는 올해 학교 수련회를 취소해야 했습니다. 많은 가정이 자녀를 보내는 비용을 감당할 수 없었기 때문입니다. 학교는 어려운 결정이었지만 불가피했다고 밝혔습니다.
items.title_en: Auckland school cancels camp as families cannot afford it
items.title_ko: 오클랜드 학교, 가정 경제 어려움으로 수련회 취소
items.title_original: Auckland school forced to cancel school camp as families unable to afford it

items.raw_excerpt: The Sands For Singapore Charity Festival initiative will take place during the whole month of August, with a three-night event featuring music performances, food pop-ups and more, taking place from Aug 28 to 30.
items.summary_en: Marina Bay Sands is holding a charity festival for the whole month of August. The main event runs from August 28 to 30 with free music performances and food pop-ups. The festival aims to support local Singapore charities.
items.summary_ko: 마리나 베이 샌즈가 8월 한 달간 싱가포르 자선 페스티벌을 개최합니다. 8월 28일부터 30일까지 3일간 음악 공연과 팝업 레스토랑 등 다양한 프로그램이 무료로 진행됩니다. 이번 페스티벌은 싱가포르 지역 자선단체를 지원하기 위해 마련되었습니다.
items.title_en: Marina Bay Sands hosts free charity festival with music and food
items.title_ko: 마리나 베이 샌즈, 8월 자선 페스티벌 개최 - 무료 공연과 팝업 다이닝
items.title_original: Sands For Singapore Charity Festival 2026 by Marina Bay Sands will have free performances, dining pop-ups and more

items.raw_excerpt: July 22 : Zimbabwe have included uncapped wicketkeeper-batter Tafadzwa Tsiga in their squad for the Twenty20 International series against India that starts at the Harare Sports Club on Thursday.• Tsiga, 32, has played 10 Tests for Zimbabwe but never before featured in limited-overs international cricket.
items.summary_en: Zimbabwe have added wicketkeeper-batter Tafadzwa Tsiga to their squad for the T20 International series against India. The series starts Thursday at the Harare Sports Club. Tsiga, 32, has played 10 Tests but has never appeared in limited-overs international cricket.
items.summary_ko: 짐바브웨는 목요일 하라레 스포츠 클럽에서 시작되는 인도와의 T20 국제 시리즈에 위켓키퍼 겸 타자 타파드즈와 치가를 합류시켰다. 32세인 치가는 테스트 10경기에 출전한 바 있지만, 한정 오버 국제 크리켓에는 처음으로 이름을 올렸다.
items.title_en: Zimbabwe call up wicketkeeper Tsiga for T20 series against India
items.title_ko: 짐바브웨, 인도 T20 시리즈에 위켓키퍼 치가 발탁
items.title_original: Zimbabwe call up wicketkeeper Tsiga for T20 series against India

items.raw_excerpt: เมืองลี่เป็นพื้นที่ภูเขาที่เผชิญกับความยากลำบากมากมาย ตำบลนี้มีครัวเรือนทั้งหมด 1,035 ครัวเรือน และประชากร 5,655 คน อาศัยอยู่ใน 15 หมู่บ้าน ในจำนวนนี้ 9 หมู่บ้านเป็นที่อยู่อาศัยของกลุ่มชาติพันธุ์ม้ง ส่วนที่เหลือเป็นที่อยู่อาศัยของกลุ่มชาติพันธุ์ไทย ม้ง และกลุ่มชาติพันธุ์อื่นๆ พื้นที่กว้างใหญ่ หมู่บ้านหลายแห่งอยู่ห่างไกลจากศูนย์กลาง และการคมนาคมไม่สะดวก ดังนั้น การนำความรู้ด้านกฎหมาย ปัญหาประชากร และการดูแลสุขภาพอนามัยเจริญพันธุ์ไปสู่ประชาชน จึงต้องอาศัยความพยายามอย่างต่อเนื่องของเจ้าหน้าที่ท้องถ
items.summary_en: Muong Ly is a mountainous commune with over 1,000 households spread across 15 villages, many of them home to Hmong communities. Officials are working to bring legal knowledge and reproductive health education to residents despite the area's remoteness and difficult roads.
items.summary_ko: 농리 마을은 15개 마을에 걸쳐 1,000가구 이상이 흩어져 살며, 그중 9개는 몽족 마을이다. 도로 사정이 좋지 않고 마을이 넓게 분포해 있어, 관리들이 법률 지식과 보건 의료 교육을 주민에게 전달하기 위해 꾸준히 노력하고 있다.
items.title_en: Efforts to Reduce Child Marriage in Remote Mountain Commune
items.title_ko: 외딴 산간 마을에서 아동 결혼 줄이기 노력
items.title_original: การลดปัญหาการแต่งงานในวัยเด็กในตำบลเมืองลี่ ซึ่งเป็นพื้นที่ภูเขา - Vietnam.vn

items.raw_excerpt: Austria will formally open a new police station on Wednesday in Adolf Hitler's former house, in the hope of deterring today's ascendant far-right extremists from making the pilgrimage to the Nazi dictator's birthplace.
items.summary_en: Austria will open a new police station on Wednesday in Adolf Hitler's former house. The move aims to deter far-right extremists from visiting the Nazi dictator's birthplace. The building is located in Braunau am Inn near the German border.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아가 수요일 아돌프 히틀러의 옛 집에 새 경찰서를 개관할 예정이다. 이 조치는 극우 극단주의자들의 순례를 막기 위한 것이다. 해당 건물은 독일 국경 근처 브라우나우 앰 인에 위치해 있다.
items.title_en: Hitler's Austrian birthplace near German border becomes police station
items.title_ko: 히틀러 오스트리아 출생지, 경찰서로 변환
items.title_original: Hitler's Austrian birthplace near German border becomes police station

items.raw_excerpt: When summer temperatures climb in Norway, visiting a pool or water park is a great way to cool off, stay active, and have fun with family or friends. Here are some options in Norway’s biggest cities.
items.summary_en: Norway's biggest cities have great pools and water parks for summer fun. Families can cool off and stay active at these local spots. Here are some top picks for beating the heat.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이의 주요 도시들은 여름철에 가족이 즐길 수 있는 수영장과 워터파크를 갖추고 있다. 이러한 장소들은 더위를 피하고 활동적으로 쉬기에 좋다. 더위를 식히기 위한 최고의 장소들을 소개한다.
items.title_en: Swimming Pools and Water Parks in Oslo, Stavanger, and Bergen
items.title_ko: 오슬로, 스타방에르, 베르겐의 수영장과 워터파크
items.title_original: LISTED: Swimming pools and water parks in Oslo, Stavanger, and Bergen

items.raw_excerpt: In warm (and not so warm) weather, getting outside on the balcony in Switzerland can offer some valuable respite. But what are you actually allowed to do?
items.summary_en: Swiss residents have rules about using their balconies. Some activities like nudity or loud barbecues may be restricted. Your balcony rights depend on your building's policies and local laws.
items.summary_ko: 스위스 주민들은 발코니 사용에 대한 규칙이 있습니다. 알몸이나 큰 소리의 바비큐 같은 일부 활동은 제한될 수 있습니다. 발코니 사용 권리는 건물 정책과 지역 법에 따라 다릅니다.
items.title_en: What You Can and Can't Do on Your Balcony in Switzerland
items.title_ko: 스위스 발코니에서 할 수 있는 것과 할 수 없는 것
items.title_original: Nudity? BBQs? What you can and can’t do on your balcony in Switzerland

items.raw_excerpt: Austria will formally open a new police station on Wednesday in Adolf Hitler's former house, in the hope of deterring today's ascendant far-right extremists from making the pilgrimage to the Nazi dictator's birthplace.
items.summary_en: Austria is opening a new police station in the house where Hitler was born. The government hopes this will stop far-right extremists from visiting the site. The building is located in a small town near the German border.
items.summary_ko: 오스트리아가 히틀러가 태어난 집에 새로운 경찰서를 개서한다. 정부는 이번 조치로 극우 극단주의자들의 이곳 순방을 막을 수 있기를 기대하고 있다. 해당 건물은 독일 국경 근처 작은 마을에 위치해 있다.
items.title_en: Hitler's Austrian birthplace near German border becomes police station
items.title_ko: 독일 국경 근처 히틀러 오스트리아 출생지에 경찰서 개서
items.title_original: Hitler's Austrian birthplace near German border becomes police station

items.raw_excerpt: Young adults remain the age group most likely to fall behind on payments, according to new figures from Suomen Asiakastieto.
items.summary_en: Young adults in Finland are the most likely age group to fall behind on payments. New figures show that online shopping and higher living costs are driving young people into debt.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드에서 20~30대가 지불 연체가 가장 높은 연령대다. 새로운 수치에 따르면 온라인 쇼핑과 생활비 인상이 청년들의 빚을 키우고 있다.
items.title_en: Online Shopping and Rising Costs Push Young Finns Into Debt
items.title_ko: 온라인 쇼핑과 생활비 상승, 핀란드 청년 빚 증가
items.title_original: Online shopping and rising living costs driving young Finns into debt

items.raw_excerpt: Tross over 15 år i nabolaget har hun ingen planer om å pakke flytteeskene.
items.summary_en: Norwegian actress Agnes Kittelsen has lived in her Kristiansand neighborhood for over fifteen years. She says she has everything she needs and no plans to move.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이 배우 아그네스 키텔센은 크리스티안산 동네에서 15년 넘게 살아왔어요. 그녀는 필요한 모든 것이 있다며 이사를 갈 생각이 없다고 말합니다.
items.title_en: Actress Agnes Kittelsen lives in the city center but loves the village feel
items.title_ko: 배우 아그네스 키텔센, 도시 한복판에 살면서도 마을 분위기를 사랑해요
items.title_original: Agnes Kittelsen, Skuespiller | Bor midt i byen, men elsker landsbyfølelsen: – Har alt jeg trenger - KRS - Avisen Kristiansand

items.raw_excerpt: Richmond and Northallerton MP Rishi Sunak joined residents at the Catterick and Tunstall Village Fete, meeting volunteers, stallholders and families.
items.summary_en: Rishi Sunak, the local MP, visited the Catterick and Tunstall Village Fete. He met volunteers, stallholders, and families at the community gathering. The MP praised the strong community spirit shown at the event.
items.summary_ko: 리시 수낙 하원의원이 카터릭과 턴스탈 마을 축제를 방문했습니다. 자원봉사자, 상인, 가족들과 만나 마을의 끈끈한 공동체 정신을 칭찬했습니다.
items.title_en: Rishi Sunak praises community spirit at North Yorkshire village fete
items.title_ko: 리시 수낙, 노스 요크셔 마을 축제에서 공동체 정신 칭찬
items.title_original: Rishi Sunak praises ‘community spirit in action’ at North Yorkshire village fete - Yahoo News UK

items.raw_excerpt: Prices for fresh or frozen chicken thighs jumped 8.2 per cent from May to June — far above the monthly increases for the usual offenders like beef and coffee, according to inflation numbers.
items.summary_en: Fresh and frozen chicken thigh prices in Canada rose 8.2% from May to June. This increase was far bigger than price jumps for other common grocery items like beef and coffee.
items.summary_ko: 캐나다에서 냉장 또는 냉동 닭다리 가격이 5월에서 6월 사이 8.2% 급등했다. 이는 소고기나 커피 같은 다른 식품 가격 상승폭을 크게 웃도는 수준이다.
items.title_en: Chicken thigh prices jump 8% in a single month in Canada
items.title_ko: 캐나다 닭다리 가격, 한 달 만에 8% 급등
items.title_original: Chicken thighs are how much? Here's what's driving the latest grocery sticker shock

items.raw_excerpt: Some members of the tech startup community told CNA they are cutting short their stay in Johor and returning home after authorities ordered the Network School to cease operations immediately.
items.summary_en: Malaysian authorities ordered the Forest City campus of the Network School to cease operations immediately. Some tech startup community members are cutting short their stay in Johor and returning home. Students and staff express disappointment as their plans are disrupted.
items.summary_ko: 말레이시아 조호르주 포레스트시티의 네스워크 스쿨이 즉각 폐쇄 명령을 받았다. 테크 스타트업 공동체 일부 구성원들은 체류를 줄이고 귀국하고 있다. 구성원들은 갑작스러운 폐쇄로 계획에 차질이 빚어져 안타까워하고 있다.
items.title_en: Network School members frustrated after Johor campus ordered to close
items.title_ko: 네트워크 스쿨 포레스트시티 캠퍼스 폐쇄 명령에 구성원들 실망
items.title_original: ‘Hopes are dashed’: Network School members express frustration after Forest City campus ordered to close

items.raw_excerpt: Firing up the barbecue outdoors, surrounded by spectacular Swiss nature, is one of the favoured summer activities for many people. But amid dire drought conditions, what are the rules this summer?
items.summary_en: Switzerland is experiencing a severe drought this summer. Outdoor barbecuing is a popular activity, but strict rules now apply. Residents must follow specific safety measures to prevent fires.
items.summary_ko: 스위스는 올여름 심각한 가뭄을 겪고 있습니다. 야외 바비큐는 인기 있는 활동이지만, 이제는 엄격한 규칙이 적용됩니다. 주민들은 화재를 방지하기 위해 특정 안전 조치를 따라야 합니다.
items.title_en: Is Barbecuing in Switzerland Allowed During the Drought?
items.title_ko: 가뭄 중 스위스에서 바비큐를 허용하나요?
items.title_original: EXPLAINED: Is barbecuing in Switzerland allowed during the drought?
